summary: Linked the item translation unit `melee/it/items/itsonans.c` by switching it from NonMatching to Matching, cleaning two near-matching functions, correcting item state table/data symbol metadata, and removing local literal globals from the header/source.

key_files.role: Main item source linked; item state table symbol/name adjusted; functions `it_802CD4FC`, `it_802CD7D4`, and `itSonans_UnkMotion1_Anim` rewritten for matching.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot reports `it_802CD4FC` and `it_802CD7D4` reached 100%

key_files.role: Header cleanup; removed definitions of literal-backed globals `it_804DD3D0` and `it_804DD3C8` while keeping the `it_803F7CA0` extern.
Symbol metadata changed several itsonans-adjacent string/float/double symbols from global address-style names to local labels.

what_changed.text: The item state table definition was renamed from `it_803F7C70` to `it_803F7CA0`, and the third state id changed from `2` to `-1`.
`it_802CD4FC` replaced manual absolute-value branches with `ABS`, inlined `-0.9` and `0.017453292f`, and removed use of generated-looking global literal names.
`it_802CD7D4` removed temporary locals and manual absolute-value logic in favor of `ABS(...)` comparisons and direct expressions.
`itSonans_UnkMotion1_Anim` removed the source-level `it_804DD3B8` zero global and rewrote the decrement/compare using a local `int zero`, a `f32 lifetime`, and a ternary return.
Header definitions for `it_804DD3D0 = 0.017453292f` and `it_804DD3C8 = -0.9` were deleted.

Several `.data`, `.sdata`, and `.sdata2` entries in `symbols.txt` were changed from global address-style names to local labels such as `@228`, `@229`, `@230`, `@159`, `@226`, `@227`, `@233`, and `@259`.
The bot report recorded five new matches for the itsonans unit, including `.sdata2`, `.sdata`, `.data`, `it_802CD4FC`, and `it_802CD7D4`.

smart_moves.text: Used project macro-style cleanup (`ABS`) to replace generated-looking manual sign checks while landing full matches for two functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new matches for both functions

smart_moves.text: Removed fake-looking header/source literal globals and represented the constants as literals in the function body, while updating symbol metadata to local labels.
Kept the PR focused on one item TU and its required build/symbol metadata rather than broad unrelated cleanup.
evidence_refs: changed_files: 4 files all tied to itsonans link

decomp_lessons.lesson: For item functions with manual sign-normalization patterns, try the project `ABS` macro before preserving branchy decompiler output.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `it_802CD4FC` replaces two manual abs blocks with `ABS`
raw_diff: `it_802CD7D4` replaces manual abs temporaries with `ABS`
text_corpus: bot report shows both functions reached 100%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not keep file-local constants as globally named variables in headers when the matching source can use literals and symbol metadata can mark the backing data as local.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `.sdata2` symbols changed from global names to local labels

naming_conventions.text: This PR prefers local-label metadata such as `@228`, `@229`, and `@230` over global address-style names for itsonans string/float/double data when the data appears local.
The item state table symbol used by the source/header is `it_803F7CA0`, not the prior source definition name `it_803F7C70`.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use `ABS(expr)` for MWCC-friendly absolute-value code shape instead of manual `if (x < 0) x = -x` temporaries when bot/objdiff evidence supports the match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new function matches

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Inline numeric constants and mark backing float/double/string symbols local when global literal variables were only scaffolding for the prior nonmatching source.
A local integer zero plus a separate `f32 lifetime` temporary and ternary return was used in `itSonans_UnkMotion1_Anim`; this is recorded as PR-specific matching evidence, not a general style rule.

follow_up_queries: Find other item PRs where manual absolute-value branches were replaced with ABS for final matching.
Search for header-defined float/double literal globals in item headers that may be scaffolding rather than source-owned data.
Search for item TUs still marked NonMatching next to similar configure.py one-line promotions.
Search symbols.txt for global address-style data symbols in item TUs that later became local labels.
Review other `ItemStateTable` definitions where a final state id may need `-1` rather than a numeric motion id.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR metadata, changed files, merge timestamp
raw_diff: complete diff, 9295 chars, not truncated
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report with match deltas
notes: PR body is empty and there are no review comments, so reviewer rationale and author intent are not available.
Bot report supports match outcomes for two functions and data sections, but no full build log or objdiff transcript is included in the slice.
The diff supports concrete code and metadata changes; broader conclusions about original source style should remain curator-reviewed.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use ABS for branchy sign-normalization cleanup when matching item float comparisons
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2362, replacing manual negative checks with `ABS(...)` in `it_802CD4FC` and `it_802CD7D4` corresponded with both functions reaching 100% in the bot report. Candidate scope: item float absolute-value comparisons.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer literals/local symbol metadata over fake global constant definitions
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2362 removed global-looking literal definitions from `itsonans.h`/`itsonans.c`, inlined `-0.9` and `0.017453292f`, and changed related symbols to local labels while linking the TU.

source_update_candidates.title: `src/melee/it/items/itsonans.c` linked in PR 2362
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2362 changed `configure.py` so `melee/it/items/itsonans.c` is built as `Object(Matching, ...)` instead of `Object(NonMatching, ...)`; bot report recorded five new matches for the itsonans unit.
source_update_candidates.reason: Path status and matching state are source/path facts and should be curated, not promoted by intake.

source_update_candidates.title: itsonans local data symbol metadata changes
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2362 changed several itsonans-related `.data`, `.sdata`, and `.sdata2` symbols from global address-style names to local labels in `config/GALE01/symbols.txt`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Symbol ownership/scope metadata belongs in source-owned path facts or data sheets after curator review.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize the `int zero` plus ternary pattern in `itSonans_UnkMotion1_Anim` into a standard; the slice only proves this PR used it.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale from merge status; there are no review comments in the slice.
Do not claim complete objdiff/build validation beyond the bot report's listed match deltas.
